name: n8n
primary_use: AI workflow automation and agent backends
ideal_customer: founders, operators, agencies, and technical marketers
pricing_note: Cloud plans start around EUR 20 per month
positioning: n8n is the best fit when the buyer wants flexible automations and can tolerate a visual workflow builder.

name: RingFoods
ideal_customer: restaurants that miss calls during rush periods
pricing_note: Plans listed from 100 to 300 USD per month
positioning: RingFoods is the clearest restaurant affiliate angle because missed calls are easy to explain and commissions are recurring.

name: Maple
primary_use: restaurant phone ordering reservations and POS handoff
ideal_customer: restaurant groups consultants and POS adjacent sellers
pricing_note: New users receive 15% off for 3 months via affiliate program
positioning: Maple is useful for comparison pages where POS integrations and phone workflows matter.

name: ShevaFood
primary_use: QR menu and digital restaurant menu operations
ideal_customer: small restaurants cafes and local food operators
pricing_note: Example subscription cited at 15 EUR per month
positioning: ShevaFood is a lower-ticket restaurant software offer for QR menu and digital menu intent.

name: FoodShot AI
primary_use: AI food photography and menu visuals
ideal_customer: restaurants improving menus delivery listings and ads
pricing_note: Pricing not confirmed on affiliate page
positioning: FoodShot AI targets food photography search intent and can cross-sell menu optimization.

name: OpenClaw
pricing_note: Open-source tool; monetize via alternatives and managed setup pages
positioning: OpenClaw should be treated as traffic capture and comparison intent rather than a direct affiliate offer until a program is verified.

name: Reclaim AI
positioning: Reclaim is a secondary AI automation affiliate for posts about operational automation stacks.

name: Digital First AI
primary_use: AI marketing plans and campaign content
pricing_note: Pricing not confirmed on affiliate page
positioning: Digital First AI fills marketing automation comparison pages.
